# Gower-metric support policy

This document outlines the support policy for the Gower-metric project. By using or contributing to this project, you agree to the terms outlined in [the Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).

## Support Channels

The primary channels for support are:
- **GitHub Issues**: For reporting bugs, requesting features, or seeking help with specific problems related to the Gower-metric project. Please ensure that you provide detailed information to help us understand and address your issue effectively.
- **Private messages (less preferred)**: For sensitive issues or inquiries that you prefer not to share publicly, you can reach out to the maintainers via private messages on GitHub.

## License

The Gower-metric project is licensed under the [MIT License](../LICENSE.txt). This means you are free to use, modify, and distribute the software, provided that you include the original license and copyright notice in any copies or substantial portions of the software.
